{"query":"Bulgari Place Vendome historic location celebration event July 2026 LVMH","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1928,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/news-lvmh/lvmh-unveils-les-journees-particulieres-2026-program-65-venues-open-across-11-countries-and-exclusive-experiences","title":"LVMH unveils Les Journées Particulières 2026 progr... - LVMH","content":"«With this new edition of Les Journées Particulières, we wanted to return to the very origin of the dream: the places where our Maisons are rooted, the territories that inspire them, and those who bring them to life.
Louis Vuitton will also open several emblematic locations, from the historic Atelier d'Asnières and the family home to the Abbaye Vendôme, in Loir-et-Cher, where leather craftsmanship specialized in precious leathers will be highlighted.
From now on, the public can discover all the open locations and proposed experiences on the Les Journées Particulières website.
Registrations will open during September 2026 on Les Journées Particulières 2026 - LVMH"},{"url":"https://luxferity.com/brand/bulgari/news/lvmh-watch-week-2026-art-of-gold-bulgari-timepieces","title":"Bulgari: Art Of Gold At LVMH Watch Week 2026 - Luxferity","content":"“I am immensely proud that LVMH Maisons — including Bvlgari, TAG Heuer, Zenith, Hublot, Tiffany & Co., La Fabrique du Temps and L’Epée — are uniting for LVMH Watch Week,” affirmed Jean-Christophe Babin, CEO of Bvlgari and LVMH Watch Division.
Bvlgari’s Maglia Milanese Monete integrates Renaissance‑origin Milanese mesh with the hallowed aesthetic of ancient Roman coinage.
The new Lvcea Notte di Luce dials celebrate decades‑old Japanese Urushi lacquer and Raden inlay, each piece requiring over 60 days of meticulous creation.
"Maglia Milanese Monete, Tubogas Manchette, Serpenti Seduttori Automatic and Lvcea Notte di Luce are new chapters of a single story — that of a jeweller‑watchmaker celebrating its origins through constant reinvention.""},{"url":"https://www.lvmh.com/en/our-group/special-events","title":"Special events - LVMH","content":"Special events organized by LVMH or our partners are key moments in the Group's communications.
LVMH, major partner of the French Pavilion.
For six months, over 160 countries and international organizations will come together."},{"url":"https://en.worldtempus.com/article/new-watches/lvmh-watch-week-2026-7th-edition-brought-together-9-brands-milan-playing-group-synergy-card-81848.html","title":"LVMH Watch Week 2026: The 7th Edition Brought Together 9 Brands in Milan, Playing the Group Synergy Card | Worldtempus","content":"In his opening speech, Jean-Christophe Babin, President of LVMH’s Watch Division, highlighted the diversity and complementarity of the Group’s nine brands, which unveiled their latest creations to the press in early 2026 on the famous Via Montenapoleone: Bulgari, Daniel Roth, Gérald Genta, Hublot, L’Epée 1839, Louis Vuitton, TAG Heuer, Tiffany and Zenith.
Daniel Roth, Gérald Genta and Louis Vuitton are all positioned in high watchmaking, with every piece created within this integrated manufacture of 200 people, regularly honoured at the Grand Prix d’Horlogerie de Genève.
The DEFY family will celebrate its 60th anniversary in 2029 and was relaunched in 2022 under the DEFY Skyline name.
Three limited editions will appeal to fans of the UEFA Europa League (Classic Fusion), Samuel Ross (Big Bang Unico), and above all Novak Djokovic."}]}
